title: roasted baby dutch aubergine pancake
description: a fresh, aerated, and cozy dutch dish featuring roasted baby aubergine and kombu-cold-extract
instructions: heat an iron teppan over medium heat
roast the baby aubergine for 3 minutes per side
infuse kombu in ice-cold water for 30 minutes
whisk together rice flour and water to form a batter
add salt and black pepper to the batter
brush the teppan with a small amount of oil
pour the batter onto the teppan
place the roasted aubergine in the center of the batter
carefully pour the kombu-infused water around the aubergine
cook for 3-4 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown
flip the pancake and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes
